description: Root dashboard.json is the aggregated summary consumed by dashboard.md, GitHub Pages, future Web Dashboard, and GyroOS Dashboard. Detailed source data is stored under data/*.json.

generation_policy.principle: data/*.json contains structured source data; root dashboard.json contains display-ready aggregate summary.

project.name: Gyro Project
project.current_focus: Gyro Logic paper preparation after Minimal Formal Model v1 and GyroAuth formal security model study

current_status.gyro_logic: Mathematical Formalization Study Completed / Minimal Formal Model v1 / Paper Preparation Ready
current_status.gyro_os: v4.0 PoC active / additional runtime-positioning study deferred
current_status.gyro_auth: Primary and Applied Papers Published / Competitive Differentiation and Formal Security Model Study Active
current_status.gyro_developer_tools: Document, model-version, publication, and future criterion-audit tooling candidates

current_focus: Gyro Logic README, paper, and release candidate reflection
GyroAuth Criterion Integrity and Formal Security Model Study

gyro_logic_formalization.boundary: Minimal Formal Model v1 is provisional and integrated, not a final axiomatization. Canonical Core definitions remain unchanged and Gyro Logic is not identified with one existing mathematical field.
